title: CNBC Daily Open: Oil jitters persist as U.S. targets Iranian ships near Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Oil was slightly higher as traders expect a group of countries to tap emergency crude reserves to mitigate disruption caused by the war in the Middle East.
summary_public: Oil was slightly higher as traders expect a group of countries to tap emergency crude reserves to mitigate disruption caused by the war in the Middle East.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. targets Iranian ships near Strait of Hormuz
